meme.title: Maybe I should post it on Nextdoor.

headlines.h: Science Desk Investigates: The tiny faces of regret
headlines.b: The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.

headlines.h: Markets React To: Cat: time for chaos...
headlines.b: Treat futures up. Productivity down. The couch remains occupied.

headlines.h: Weather Alert: Don't tell me to get down, human! I go where I please!
headlines.b: Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.
Experts urge humans to stop taking it personally and start providing snacks.
